exercises.title: Factorial
exercises.instructions:
Write a recursive function called factorial(n) that returns n!

Print factorial(5).
exercises.hints: Base case: if (n === 0) return 1; Recursive: return n * factorial(n - 1)

exercises.title: What is a higher-order function in JavaScript?

answers.text: A function that takes or returns another function
A method defined inside a class
A variable that holds a number
